title: No more reliance on the manager's card
text: Individual budgets mean staff can spend from their own card, not a single shared manager card passed around the shift.

title: Receipt capture at point of spend
text: Staff photograph the receipt as they spend; OCR extracts merchant, amount and GST and matches it to the transaction automatically.

title: Real-time spend visibility
text: Finance sees what's been spent as it happens, not at the end of the month.

title: Multi-entity, multi-venue visibility
text: One consolidated dashboard for finance across every venue and every entity.

title: Budget controls per venue or department
text: Limits set per venue, per team (kitchen, FOH, maintenance) or per card, with real-time approval for anything over.

title: Dedicated subscription management
text: Head office manages every venue's subscriptions in one place instead of discovering dozens of scattered Spotify and Sky Sports accounts.

title: Instant card issuance & freezing
text: A departing manager's card is cancelled instantly with no disruption to the venue; a new manager has a working card within seconds.
